name: Customer Journey Map
description: Customer Journey Map - Marketing template for brand professionals
instructions: HOW TO USE THIS JOURNEY MAP Step 1: Define Your Personas Start with the Personas tab. Define 3-5 customer personas. Each journey map should be built for a specific persona — different customers have different journeys. Step 2: Map the Full Journey Go to the Journey Map tab. For each of the 6 stages (Awareness through Advocacy), fill in the touchpoints, customer actions, thoughts, emotions, pain points, and opportunities. Be honest about negative experiences. Step 3: Identify Touchpoints Use the Touchpoint Inventory to catalogue every interaction point across all channels. Rate each touchpoint
